text:
is a line of candy toys produced by Shokugan that was released in May 2004. http://www.k3museum.com/goods_html/BANDAI0094.html 

There are 4 unique figures and one variation in this set. The are pre-painted PVC figure pilot with 6-12,5 centimeters in height that can be build by putting the parts together. It is mostly fixed and has a limitated articulation in some parts. There are color variations like a Red plugsuit for Rei and a White plugsuit for Asuka. As for the Evangelion it come in black and yellow colors for Unit-01 Type F and a black and yellow for Jet Alone Kai. https://www.bandai.co.jp/candy/products/2004/20888.html

Trivia

It was the first commercial figure of Jet Alone Kai that was produced.
